arts.ttl: Goretzka discusses possible return to Germany squad
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka hasn't represented Germany since 2023. But could Julian Nagelsmann reward his fine form with a call-up?

arts.ttl: When can Florian Wirtz return from injury at the earliest?
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have confirmed that Florian Wirtz will be sidelined for a number of weeks, but how long exactly will the Germany international be out for?

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Campus Round Up: What is going wrong with Bayern Munich’s youth teams?
arts.sum: Bayern won the first game against Köln in January with a 4-1 end result, but had to settle for a 0-2 loss today. A win would give Bayern a 6 point cushion over Bremen with 3 games to go, but a loss would put them on level terms heading into the final matches of the season.

arts.ttl: Report: How Harry Kane really feels about returning to Tottenham from Bayern Munich this summer
arts.sum: When Harry Kane swapped Tottenham Hotspur for Bayern Munich in pursuit of trophies in 2023, there was always the feeling that the striker would one...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: The odds are stacked against Bayer Leverkusen in the second leg of their Champions League tie with Bayern Munich. A poor performance from the German champions saw Leverkusen lose 3-0 at Bayern in the first leg and it would take a miraculous recovery to progress to the quarter-finals tonight. Architects of their own downfall, a […] The post Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leon Goretzka happy Bayern Munich leads Champions League tie, expecting battle from Bayer Leverkusen even without Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Goretzka knows that Bayer Leverkusen will look a little different given the injury to Florian Wirtz Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s second leg of the Champions League tie with Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah ready for challenge, says Bayer Leverkusen can’t be scared vs. Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen center-back Jonathan Tah almost made the jump to Bayern Munich last summer before a potential deal fell apart. Tah will be part of a backline seeking to keep a clean sheet against a very formidable Bayern Munich attack.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Harry Kane to leave Bayern Munich this summer?; Race for Real Madrid, Bayern leading on Dean Huijsen?; Newcastle chasing Bayer Leverkusen’s Victor Boniface?; Arsenal leads on Benjamin Šeško; and MORE!
arts.sum: Harry Kane’s time at Bayern Munich may be shorter than expected, with reports emerging that the German giants are open to selling the English striker if a Premier League club meets his £67 million release clause. Manchester United, Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly on alert as Bayern Munich prepare to sell Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich travel to Bayer Leverkusen in the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Tuesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany not expecting warm welcome or easy time vs. Bayer Leverkusen in Champions League
arts.sum: When we play a game, we go into it with the main priority of wanting to win it,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). You might think that Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany is feeling at least a little comfortable holding a 3-0 lead on aggregate over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League .
